artifacts.excerpt:
I think existence is maya so none of it is FUNDAMENTALLY real because EVERYTHING dies or changes

BUT in any particular context across the multiverse you can have order so some things are more real, ie more stable, persistent, than others

You can temporarily rely on your knowledge about what’s real to create order

But contextual knowledge is not transcendent and cannot put your questions to rest permanently
